name: Oven Candied Sweet Potatoes
recipeInstructions:
1. Scrub and boil whole sweet potatoes in salted water until just tender (25-40 minutes).
2. Preheat oven to 375°F.
3. Drain, peel, and cut the potatoes into 1-inch slices.
4. In a 1 1/2-quart casserole dish, layer half of the potato slices with brown sugar, butter, and salt.
5. Repeat layers with remaining ingredients.
6. Bake uncovered for 30-40 minutes or until glazed.
7. Sprinkle marshmallows over top.
8. Bake about 5 more minutes until lightly browned.
